data:
Search results for "llvmlite Pass Manager optimization pipeline example":

Title: Optimization passes — llvmlite 0.49.0dev0+18.g6302ab2.dirty documentation
URL: https://llvmlite.readthedocs.io/en/latest/user-guide/binding/optimization-passes.html
Content: # Optimization passes. Optimization passes are managed by a pass manager. llvmlite provides bindings for LLVM’s *New Pass Manager*. Prior to llvmlite 0.45 (LLVM 20), llvmlite also supported the *Legacy Pass Manager*, which had a different API and behavior. The differences between them and the motivations for the New Pass Manager are outlined in the LLVM Blog post on the New Pass Manager. As of llvmlite 0.45 (LLVM 20), support for the Legacy Pass Manager has been removed. ## New Pass Manager APIs. :   A pass manager for running optimization passes on an LLVM module. :   A pass manager for running optimization passes on an LLVM function. """Demonstration of llvmlite's New Pass Manager API.This example shows how to use the new pass manager to optimize LLVM IR.Comments show the equivalent legacy pass manager approach for comparison. :   Create a new pass manager to run optimization passes on a module. :   Create a new pass manager to run optimization passes on a function of the given *module*, a `ModuleRef` instance.

Title: The New Pass Manager for llvmlite
URL: https://hackmd.io/VOqERxJrQwGX0Yduyk7VPg
Content: Creating a pipeline with explicitly-specified passes. From examples/npm_passes.py : # Set up the module pass manager used to run our optimization pipeline.

Title: [llvm-dev] [RFC] Changing the default pass manager for the optimization pipeline
URL: https://groups.google.com/g/llvm-dev/c/Im829naY0PI/m/M9_zHyFJAQAJ
Content: # [llvm-dev] [RFC] Changing the default pass manager for the optimization pipeline. We've been fixing the various remaining issues in order to turn on the new pass manager for the optimization pipeline, and it's about time to turn it on. There's also the LLVM C API and bugpoint that still use the legacy PM, which can be ported later on and only block the removal of the legacy PM. >We've been fixing the various remaining issues in order to turn on the new. >pass manager for the optimization pipeline, and it's about time to turn it. >codegen pipeline since that's mostly not been ported to use the new PM. >There's also the LLVM C API and bugpoint that still use the legacy PM,. >which can be ported later on and only block the removal of the legacy PM.

Title: Recommended LLVM passes : r/Compilers
URL: https://www.reddit.com/r/Compilers/comments/1hqmd7x/recommended_llvm_passes
Content: # Recommended LLVM passes : r/Compilers. Skip to main contentRecommended LLVM passes : r/Compilers. Sign UpSign up for RedditLog InLog in to Reddit. # Recommended LLVM passes. I'm working on a compiler that uses LLVM (v16) for codegen, and I'm wondering what passes I should tell LLVM to perform at various optimization levels, and in what order (if that matters). From my testing, it seems like Clang uses all the same passes for -O1 and up:. Running pass: Annotation2MetadataPass on [module]. Running pass: ForceFunctionAttrsPass on [module]. Running pass: InferFunctionAttrsPass on [module]. Running pass: CoroEarlyPass on [module]. Running pass: OpenMPOptPass on [module]. Running pass: RequireAnalysisPass<llvm::GlobalsAA, llvm::Module, llvm::AnalysisManager<Module>> on [module]. Running pass: RequireAnalysisPass<llvm::ProfileSummaryAnalysis, llvm::Module, llvm::AnalysisManager<Module>> on [module]. That, and some tips and tricks for setting up your own pipeline: e.g., in the Swift compiler you'll notice DCEPass (dead code elimination) is added before the call to buildPerModuleDefaultPipeline (which itself adds SROA among many others) with a comment "Run this before SROA to avoid un-neccessary expansion of dead loads": https://github.com/swiftlang/swift/blob/55189bae8e5516967998000deaa0e138a1c9f4fa/lib/IRGen/IRGen.cpp#L405-L412.

Title: Investigate new LLVM pass manager API · Issue #5
URL: https://github.com/numba/llvmlite/issues/5
Content: [Draft] Add APIs to run individual passes, combination of passes and Default optimization pipelines with new pass managernumba/llvmlite
